    CoLa Training Services

    Award winning Training Provider!

    CoLa Training Services

    Here at CoLa Training Services we pride ourselves on our first class vocational training.

    ​

    We are also proud to be an award winning training provider having recently won the digitisation and automation award at the S.E.L to the World awards following the launch of our online training program.

    ​​

    Whether you're looking for material handling equipment, plant machinery, first aid, health and safety, food safety or Driver CPC training you'll not find better than an accredited course delivered by CoLa Training Services all delivered either at your premises or at Lincolnshires premier training facility, the Phoenix Centre.
